# UC-22.54.28 · CIRCIA Annual SLA & KPI Review — board-level review of reporting performance, miss rates, and remediation actions

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Once a year, the company shows its board of directors: 'how well did our cyber-incident reporting machine work this year?' We track 5 numbers (deadlines met, on-time reports, complete records). The board signs the report and tells us what to improve next year.*

---

## Description

Tracks the annual board-level review of CIRCIA-SLA KPIs. Surfaces overdue or unsigned reviews.

## Value

Quantitative performance review at board level closes the loop on CIRCIA programme maturity. Without it, the entity has no objective measure of whether the programme is improving over time.

## Implementation

(1) SOAR `circia-kpi-prefill` runs at FY-end and aggregates the five KPIs into a draft review row. (2) CISO presents to board cyber-risk committee. (3) Board signs minute; row is updated. (4) Schedule UC-22.54.28 monthly.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.54.28` archived monthly to `audit_evidence` with `circia_clause="CIRCIA-CISA-tabletop"` and `circia_clause="CIRCIA-CISA-incident-classification"`. Every row pins (review_id, review_year, kpi_72hr_sla_met, kpi_24hr_sla_met, kpi_supplemental_sla_met, kpi_classification_sla_met, kpi_retention_sla_met, board_review_at, board_review_signed_by, kpi_status). Dashboard `CIRCIA — Annual SLA KPI Review` shows the rolling 5-year KPI trend.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Skip the annual KPI review for the current FY; UC-22.54.28 MUST flag `kpi_status="annual_review_overdue"` within 14 days of FY-end.

### Negative scenario

Conduct annual review with board signed minute capturing the five KPIs; UC-22.54.28 MUST record `kpi_status="current"`.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise ≥9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- KV Store `circia_kpi_review_lookup`.
- SOAR `circia-kpi-prefill`.

## Step 1 — Review collection

```ini
[circia_kpi_review_lookup]
enforceTypes = true
field.review_id = string
field.review_year = number
field.kpi_72hr_sla_met = number
field.kpi_24hr_sla_met = number
field.kpi_supplemental_sla_met = number
field.kpi_classification_sla_met = number
field.kpi_retention_sla_met = number
field.board_review_at = number
field.board_review_signed_by = string
field.remediation_actions = string
```

## Step 2 — Prefill playbook

`circia-kpi-prefill` runs at FY-end (12/31) and writes a row with each KPI aggregated.

## Step 3 — Search and alert

```ini
[UC-22.54.28: CIRCIA Annual SLA KPI Review]
cron_schedule = 0 6 1 * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -3y@y
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.54.28,reg=CIRCIA
action.notable.param.rule_title = CIRCIA annual KPI review overdue or unsigned
action.notable.param.security_domain = audit
action.notable.param.severity = medium
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 4 — Operationalize

**Runbook for `annual_review_overdue`** (owner: CISO, severity P3): within 30 days schedule and conduct review; document.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**CIRCIA-specific failure modes**:

- **Negative KPI trend**: if KPIs decline year-over-year, the board must direct remediation. Track actions in `remediation_actions` field.
- **Multi-year baseline**: provide 3-year baseline so single-year anomalies don't drive over-reaction.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup circia_kpi_review_lookup
| eval now_ts = now()
| eval fy_end_at = strptime(review_year . "-12-31", "%Y-%m-%d")
| eval days_since_fy_end = round((now_ts - fy_end_at) / 86400, 0)
| eval kpi_status = case(
    review_year < tonumber(strftime(now_ts, "%Y")) - 1 AND isnull(board_review_at), "annual_review_overdue",
    isnull(board_review_at) AND days_since_fy_end > 60, "annual_review_overdue",
    isnull(board_review_at), "annual_review_pending",
    isnull(board_review_signed_by), "annual_review_unsigned",
    1=1, "current")
| where kpi_status != "current"
| table review_id review_year kpi_72hr_sla_met kpi_24hr_sla_met kpi_supplemental_sla_met kpi_classification_sla_met kpi_retention_sla_met board_review_at board_review_signed_by kpi_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Rolling 5-year KPI trend. (Panel 2) Annual review status. (Panel 3) Year-over-year delta on each KPI. (Panel 4) Remediation-action tracking from past reviews.

## Known False Positives

1. **Board cadence offset** — some boards meet on FY+90 day cadence; review may be done within Q1 of the new FY. Suppression: extend grace to 90 days post-FY-end.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `circia_22_54_28_exceptions` with documented Corporate Secretary approval and 60-day maximum grant.

## References

- [NACD Cyber Risk Oversight — KPI Best Practices](https://www.nacdonline.org/)
